diseases.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
diseases.summary: Chronic condition affecting how the body metabolizes glucose; characterized by insulin resistance and relative insulin deficiency.

diseases.name: Acute Myocardial Infarction
diseases.summary: Heart attack — blockage of blood flow to the heart muscle causing tissue death.
common_symptoms: pain radiating to left arm or jaw

diseases.name: Community-Acquired Pneumonia
diseases.summary: Lower respiratory tract infection acquired outside of hospital.

diseases.name: Migraine
diseases.summary: Recurrent moderate-to-severe headache, typically unilateral, often pulsatile.

diseases.name: Asthma Exacerbation
diseases.summary: Acute worsening of airway inflammation and bronchoconstriction in a known/suspected asthmatic.
red_flags: unable to speak in full sentences

diseases.name: Iron-Deficiency Anaemia
diseases.summary: Most common type of anaemia — insufficient iron leads to reduced haemoglobin synthesis.

diseases.name: Hypertension (Essential)
diseases.summary: Persistently elevated systemic arterial blood pressure with no identified secondary cause.

diseases.name: Gastroenteritis (Acute)
diseases.summary: Inflammation of stomach and intestines, usually viral, self-limiting in adults.

diseases.name: Atopic Dermatitis
diseases.summary: Chronic relapsing inflammatory skin condition with itchy, erythematous patches.

diseases.name: Generalised Anxiety Disorder
diseases.summary: Excessive worry on most days for at least 6 months, causing distress or functional impairment.

interactions.summary: Markedly increased bleeding risk; avoid combination or monitor INR very closely.
Risk of lactic acidosis with renal impairment; hold metformin around contrast administration.
Penicillins can decrease renal clearance of methotrexate, raising toxicity.
CYP3A4 inhibition raises statin levels — rhabdomyolysis risk. Switch statin or hold.
NSAIDs reduce antihypertensive effect and raise AKI risk in the elderly.
Non-selective beta-blockers antagonise bronchodilation; avoid in asthmatics.
